title: Customer Support
heroImageAlt: Customer support agent helping a traveller
intro: A real person is one message away. Our support team helps with bookings, changes, refunds, special requests and anything else about your trip.

sections.p:
EMAIL info@flyair.lk — replied within 4 working hours (Sunday–Saturday, business hours).
PHONE 0788 788 788 — answered live during business hours.
WHATSAPP Click the floating button at the bottom of the page to chat directly during business hours.

For urgent at-airport situations (denied boarding, missed connection, lost passport), call us first — we have escalation contacts with most carriers.

sections.h: Before contacting us — what to have ready
sections.p: Have your booking reference and the email used to make the booking, the passenger names, and a short description of what you would like to do. For change requests, include the new dates or routing you have in mind. For refunds, confirm whether you would like a refund to original payment or an open ticket credit.

sections.h: What our team can help with
sections.p: Make a new booking with you over the phone. Add baggage, meals or seats to an existing booking. Change dates, times or routing. Cancel and refund. Issue duplicate confirmations. Help locate your airline booking reference. Coordinate special requests (wheelchair, infant bassinet, special meals). Arrange visa support, hotels and tours via our sister brands travellers.lk and Travellers Holidays.

Issue or alter passports and visas (you must apply directly to the relevant authority). Override an airline’s fare rule (we can ask, but the airline’s decision is final). Force a refund where the fare rules do not allow one. Access another passenger’s booking without proof of authority.

EMAIL acknowledged within 4 working hours; substantive reply within 24 working hours.
PHONE picked up within 30 seconds during business hours.
REFUND requests acknowledged within 1 working day; airline settlement typically 5 to 14 working days; we keep you updated at each stage.

You are welcome to visit our offices in Colombo, Kandy, Nuwara Eliya or Kurunegala during business hours. A short call ahead lets us prepare for your visit and confirms availability of the consultant who knows your file.
